extension.description: One-click proxy management for VSCode, Git, npm, and integrated terminals.
config.proxyUrl: Proxy server URL (e.g., http://proxy.example.com:8080) for VSCode, Git, npm, and integrated terminal proxy settings
config.pollingInterval: Auto mode polling interval in seconds (10-300). How often to check for system proxy changes.
config.detectionSourcePriority: Priority order for proxy detection sources. Sources are tried in order until one succeeds.
config.maxRetries: Maximum number of retries for proxy detection when it fails.
config.testInterval: Proxy connection test interval in seconds (Auto mode only). Range: 30-600 seconds. Default: 60 seconds.
config.autoTestEnabled: Enable automatic proxy connection testing in Auto mode. When enabled, proxy connectivity is tested periodically.
config.enableFallback: Enable fallback to manual proxy when system proxy is not detected (Auto mode only). When enabled, if no system proxy is detected, the extension will try to use the manually configured proxy as a fallback.
config.enableFallback.description: When enabled, if no system proxy is detected in Auto mode, the extension will try to use the manually configured proxy as a fallback.
config.showProxyUrl: Show proxy URL in the status bar
config.statusBarTooltip: Show the detailed status bar hover tooltip. Disabled by default so VS Code notifications are not covered while hovering the status bar.
config.syncEnabled: Enable synchronization between multiple VSCode/Cursor instances. When enabled, proxy settings are shared across all instances.
config.syncInterval: Synchronization check interval in milliseconds (100-5000). How often to check for changes from other instances.
prompt.initialSetup: How would you like to configure proxy settings?
prompt.noManualProxy: No manual proxy configured. Set one up now?
prompt.couldNotDetect: Couldn't detect system proxy. Set up manually?
prompt.proxyWorks: Proxy works! How would you like to use it?
warning.noSystemProxyDetected: No system proxy detected. Switching to Off mode.
warning.noSystemProxyCheck: No system proxy detected. Check your system/browser proxy settings.
warning.unableToPersist: Unable to persist proxy settings. Settings will be lost when VSCode restarts.
warning.detectionFailed: System proxy detection failed. You can configure a proxy manually.
warning.detectionFailedRetries: System proxy detection failed after multiple retries. Check your system/browser proxy settings.
warning.invalidFormat: Detected system proxy has invalid format: {url}
validation.proxyUrl.shellMetacharacters: Proxy URL contains dangerous shell metacharacters
validation.proxyUrl.hostnameInvalid: Hostname contains invalid characters (only alphanumeric, dots, and hyphens allowed)
validation.proxyUrl.protocol: Protocol must be http:// or https://
validation.proxyUrl.usernameInvalid: Username contains invalid characters (only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, and @ allowed)
validation.proxyUrl.passwordInvalid: Password contains invalid characters (only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, and @ allowed)
suggestion.verifyUrl: Verify the proxy URL is correct
suggestion.checkServer: Check if the proxy server is running and accessible
suggestion.checkNetwork: Ensure your network allows proxy connections
suggestion.checkFirewall: Verify firewall settings are not blocking the proxy
suggestion.testDifferentApp: Test the proxy with a different application to verify it works
suggestion.validHostname: Ensure hostname contains only alphanumeric characters, dots, and hyphens
suggestion.checkOutputLog: Check the output log for details
suggestion.invalidFormatDetected: The detected system proxy has an invalid format
suggestion.configureManualInstead: Try configuring a manual proxy instead
suggestion.verifyServerRunning: Verify the proxy server is running
statusbar.tooltip.title: Proxy Configuration
statusbar.tooltip.autoModeNoProxy: Auto Mode - No system proxy detected
statusbar.tooltip.autoOff: Auto Mode - Proxy temporarily disabled. System proxy or fallback proxy will be used when available.
statusbar.tooltip.autoFallback: Auto Mode - Using manual proxy as fallback: {url}
progress.gitConfigWaiting: Waiting for another Git settings update to finish...
fallback.usingManualProxy: System proxy not detected, using manual proxy: {url}
sync.notification.conflictResolved: Settings conflict resolved. Latest change has been applied.
error.gitConfigUpdateInProgress: Git configuration is already being updated by another VS Code/Cursor window. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
suggestion.git.ensurePath: Ensure Git is added to your system PATH
suggestion.git.restartAfterInstall: Restart VS Code after installing Git
suggestion.git.closeOtherWindows: Close other VS Code/Cursor windows and Git processes, then try again
suggestion.git.waitAndRetry: Wait a few seconds and retry the operation
suggestion.git.removeStaleLock: If a stale lock file exists, delete the global Git config lock (e.g., ~/.gitconfig.lock or %USERPROFILE%\.gitconfig.lock)
suggestion.git.tryManualCommands: Try running Git commands manually in terminal
suggestion.vscode.runWithPermissions: Try running VSCode with appropriate permissions
suggestion.vscode.restartIfPersists: Restart VSCode if the problem persists
suggestion.npm.installNode: Install Node.js and npm from https://nodejs.org/
suggestion.npm.verifyPath: Verify npm is in your system PATH
suggestion.npm.restartAfterInstall: Restart VS Code after installing npm
suggestion.npm.checkPermissions: Check file permissions for npm config files
suggestion.npm.runWithPermissions: Try running VS Code with appropriate permissions
suggestion.npm.verifyGlobalWrite: Verify you have write access to npm's global config
suggestion.npm.checkResponding: Check if npm is responding correctly
suggestion.npm.tryConfigList: Try running 'npm config list' manually to verify npm works
suggestion.npm.verifyConfig: Verify npm configuration is not corrupted
suggestion.npm.checkConfigList: Try running 'npm config list' to check npm config
suggestion.npm.resetConfig: Consider resetting npm config with 'npm config edit'
suggestion.npm.tryManualCommands: Try running npm commands manually to diagnose the issue
suggestion.proxy.configureManualInstead: Manually enter proxy URL instead of auto-detection
suggestion.proxy.checkSystemSettings: Check system proxy settings in your OS
suggestion.generic.checkDetails: Check the error details above for specific issues
config.diagnosticsEnabled: Enable read-only proxy diagnostics after state changes and when running the diagnose command.
config.automaticRemediationEnabled: Enable safe automatic proxy remediation such as bounded delayed retry and drift detection. Disruptive actions still require confirmation.
config.hostUserLockEnabled: Use cross-window locks before writing host/user proxy targets such as Git, npm, VS Code, and terminal environment mutators.
config.automaticRetryEnabled: Allow one bounded delayed retry when a proxy apply operation fails and the failure is eligible for automatic remediation.
config.remediationDelayedRetryMs: Delay before an automatic remediation retry in milliseconds.
config.remediationFlapWindowMs: Time window used to detect repeated proxy remediation failures for the same issue fingerprint.
config.remediationFlapMaxAttempts: Maximum automatic remediation attempts allowed for one issue fingerprint within the flap detection window.
config.remediationFlapCooldownMs: Cooldown applied after repeated remediation failures for the same issue fingerprint.
config.notificationCooldownMs: Minimum interval before showing another notification for the same proxy diagnostic issue.
config.slowDiagnosticsTtlMs: TTL for slow proxy diagnostics such as spawned Git, npm, or Windows commands.
config.terminalOffMaskingEnabled: When proxy mode is Off, mask inherited proxy variables for newly created integrated terminals by replacing them with empty values.
config.notificationLevel: Controls how aggressively otak-proxy shows diagnostic notifications. Details are always available from the diagnose command.
config.windowsActionsEnabled: Allow user-approved Windows proxy actions. Read-only Windows diagnostics do not require this setting.
config.credentialTargetPolicy: Controls whether otak-proxy may write authenticated proxy URLs to plaintext target config files. Secrets are still stored in VS Code SecretStorage where possible.
config.legacyEnvFirstAutoDetection: Keep the v2-compatible Auto detection order that checks process environment proxy variables before current platform settings.
remediation.notification.applyFailed: Proxy settings did not fully apply. otak-proxy recorded sanitized diagnostics.
remediation.notification.issueDetected: Proxy diagnostics found a setting that may require your attention.
remediation.notification.lockSkipped: Another otak-proxy window is already applying proxy settings. This window skipped the write.
remediation.notification.credentialConse: This proxy URL contains credentials. Applying it may write credentials to plaintext target config files such as settings.json, .gitconfig, or .npmrc.
windowsAction.notWindows: Windows proxy actions are only available on a local Windows extension host.
windowsAction.disabled: Windows proxy actions are disabled. Enable otakProxy.windowsActionsEnabled to use this command.
windowsAction.resetWinHttpConfirm: Reset the WinHTTP proxy for this Windows user context? This may affect tools that use WinHTTP.
diagnose.noIssues: Proxy diagnostics completed: no issues found.
diagnose.summaryNoPrimary: Proxy diagnostics found {issues}. See Otak Proxy Diagnostics for details.
diagnose.summary: Proxy diagnostics found {issues}: {label} - {reason}{extra}. See Otak Proxy Diagnostics for details.
diagnose.reason.managedProxyResidual: proxy should be disabled, but a proxy is still configured
diagnose.reason.managedProxyMismatch: configured proxy does not match the expected active proxy
diagnose.reason.childProcessUnavailable: Git/npm configuration could not be inspected in this extension host
diagnose.reason.windowsUnavailable: Windows proxy state cannot be inspected from this extension host
diagnose.reason.proxySupportOff: VS Code proxy support is disabled
diagnose.reason.launchProxyFlags: VS Code was launched with proxy-related process flags
diagnose.reason.inheritedProxyEnv: new terminals may inherit proxy environment variables
diagnose.reason.existingTerminals: existing terminals keep their old proxy environment
diagnose.reason.effectiveOverride: Git has an effective proxy override
diagnose.reason.npmNoproxy: npm noproxy is configured and may bypass the proxy
diagnose.reason.winhttpParseUnavailable: WinHTTP proxy output could not be parsed
diagnose.reason.wininetPac: a proxy auto-config (PAC) URL is configured
diagnose.reason.gitReadUnavailable: git configuration could not be read
migration.credentialsDropped: otak-proxy could not migrate {count} duplicate proxy credential(s) to secure storage during the v3 upgrade. Re-enter them if a proxy stops authenticating.
